spec.name: read_files_batch
spec.description: Read multiple text files and return their contents as a list of strings, preserving order.

paths.description: List of file paths to read, in order.

contents.description: Contents of each file, in the same order as paths.

spec.implementation_notes: Read each file in paths using Python's pathlib and return a list of strings. Handle missing files by raising an error.

request.rationale: I have 20 files to read and only 4 iterations left. A batch read tool will let me gather all contents in one call, then write the output in a second call, completing the objective within budget.
